creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Well... I could probably do what I asked for too...

$ portfind pkg
<jemalloc>: /usr/src/git/lib/libc/../../contrib/jemalloc/include/jemalloc/internal/arena.h:1129: Failed assertion: "((uintptr_t)ptr - ((uintptr_t)rpages + (uintptr_t)bin_info->reg0_offset)) % bin_info->reg_interval == 0"
Abort trap (core dumped)
$ uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd11 11.0-ALPHA6 FreeBSD 11.0-ALPHA6 #0 r302359M: Thu Jul  7 09:04:39 PDT 2016     ngie@fbsd11:/usr/obj/usr/src/svn/sys/GENERIC  amd64
